name: open-autonomy
description: Compile an agent profile onto a substrate (GitHub Actions or a local termfleet loop) — the open-autonomy CLI.

scripts.check:compile: bun test bin/autonomy-compile.test.ts bin/ztrack-preset.test.ts && bun bin/check-compile.ts
scripts.check: bun run check:autonomy && bun run check:core && bun run conformance exec && bun run check:runtime-sync && bun run check:compile && bun run check:profiles && bun run check:policy-consumers && bun run check:dogfood && bun run check:provision && bun run check:supply-chain && bun run check:public-agent && bun run check:agent-proxy && bun run check:proof && bun run check:soc2-register
scripts.check:agent-proxy: cd services/agent-model-proxy && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun test test/*.test.ts && bunx tsc --noEmit
scripts.check:public-agent: bun test scripts/*.test.ts && bunx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck --moduleResolution Bundler --module ESNext --target ES2022 --types bun scripts/*.ts
